# Savelle McThias

> Senior product designer and creative director with two decades of experience, specializing in enrollment and conversion UX for health and wellness brands. Based in Scottsdale, AZ, available for remote roles.

Savelle McThias is a senior product designer and creative director based in Scottsdale, Arizona, with two decades of experience across health and wellness, direct sales, and enterprise e-commerce platforms, including PetSmart, Plexus Worldwide, and Green Compass. Currently available for remote senior or lead product design roles, or enrollment and conversion design work.

## Case Studies

- [Green Compass](https://savellem.com/case-studies/green-compass-digital-experience): From-scratch distributor enrollment flow for a CBD wellness company, built as Director of Digital Experience. 25% fewer customer service calls, 12% less cart abandonment, 15% more distributor enrollments, 90 days from design to launch.
- [Card Ritual](https://savellem.com/case-studies/card-ritual): Solo-founded, designed, and built a tarot journaling web app (React Native, Next.js, Astro) in 3 months from concept to live product. Live today with paying subscribers at $5/month.
- [Yoli](https://savellem.com/case-studies/yoli-patient-practitioner-dashboard): Patient and practitioner dashboard system for an at-home Omega-3 blood test, sole product designer on the system. Now used by roughly 30,000 patients and 5,000 medical professionals; enrollment up 12% since the new intake form launched.

## About

- [About](https://savellem.com/about): Two decades of product design experience spanning Savelle LLC (Founder & Principal Designer, 2021–present), Green Compass (Director of Digital Experience, 2024), iFoodDS, SyberSafe, Plexus Worldwide, and PetSmart. Skills include UX/UI design, design systems, front-end development (React, Angular), and data-driven design.

## Contact

- [Contact](https://savellem.com/contact): Email savellem@gmail.com or connect on LinkedIn (linkedin.com/in/savelle). Based in Scottsdale, AZ, available remotely.
